basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website TIFR .has been announced through the TIFR Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 62 years of age who have completed B.E. / B. Tech. in Electrical Engineering are eligible to apply for these Consultant vacancies. The online application process for TIFR Consultant Recruitment 2026 is currently ongoing and will remain open until 30 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply online through the direct links provided below in this article.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B. Tech. in Electrical Engineering
qualification.details: Consultant : B.E. / B. Tech. in Electrical Engineering from a reputed University / Institute. Engineer from Government Departments/Autonomous Institutions/State Bodies/Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) etc. who have served in the Pay Level-13 as per VII CPC having experience in the construction, operation, and maintenance of electrical substation, including HT and LT switchgear. Expertise in electrical maintenance, high-value retrofit projects, tendering process, contract management, and project execution.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TIFR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TIFR CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the TIFR CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) recruitment is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required educational qualification for the CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) post is a B.E. / B. Tech. in Electrical Engineering from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) post is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) post will receive a salary of Rs. 90,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for TIFR CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TIFR CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the TIFR CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TIFR CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Contract-based job at the Tata Institute of Fundamental Research (TIFR).

faq.question: Q8. In which city and state is this TIFR recruitment located?
faq.answer: The TIFR recruitment for the CONSULTANT (ELECTRICAL) post is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply for this post?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of TIFR is also provided there.
